ddls:
CREATE TABLE "charging_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each charging station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the charging station */,
  "capacity" REAL /* Maximum capacity of the charging station */,
  "charging_speed" REAL /* Charging speed of the station */,
  "cost_per_unit" REAL /* Cost per unit of energy */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance performed on the station */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Predicted date for the next maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status of the station */,
  "peak_usage_time" TEXT /* Time of day when the station is most frequently used */,
  "availability" REAL /* Percentage of time the station is available for use */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "electric_vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each electric vehicle */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of the electric vehicle */,
  "battery_capacity" REAL /* Battery capacity of the vehicle */,
  "charging_speed" REAL /* Charging speed of the vehicle */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle's owner */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the vehicle was registered with the system */,
  "last_charge_date" TEXT /* Date of the last charging session */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance performed on the vehicle */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Predicted date for the next maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status of the vehicle */,
  "mileage" REAL /* Total distance traveled by the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_electric_vehicles_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_consumption" (
  "consumption_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy consumption record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the electric vehicle */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the charging station */,
  "energy_consumed" REAL /* Amount of energy consumed */,
  "charging_time" REAL /* Duration of charging */,
  "cost" REAL /* Total cost of energy consumed */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the charging session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the charging session */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the charging session */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment */,
  "energy_source" TEXT /* Source of the energy used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("consumption_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_consumption_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES electric_vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_consumption_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES charging_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user for contact */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the user */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user account */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of user account */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered with the system */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_capabilities" (
  "capability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each capability */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of the electric vehicle */,
  "capability" TEXT /* Capability of the vehicle */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the capability */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the capability data was last updated */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the capability data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("capability_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_capabilities_vehicle_type FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_type") REFERENCES electric_vehicles ("vehicle_type")
)

CREATE TABLE "thresholds" (
  "threshold_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each threshold */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the electric vehicle */,
  "lower_threshold" REAL /* Lower threshold value for alerts */,
  "upper_threshold" REAL /* Upper threshold value for alerts */,
  "alert_preference" TEXT /* User's preference for receiving alerts */,
  "notification_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of notifications */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("threshold_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_thresholds_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES electric_vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the electric vehicle */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the alert */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the alert */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert */,
  "alert_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES electric_vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "billing" (
  "bill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bill */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "consumption_id" INTEGER /* ID of the energy consumption record */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount to be paid */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method used for payment */,
  "invoice_number" TEXT /* Unique invoice number for the bill */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Date by which the payment is due */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_billing_consumption_id FOREIGN KEY ("consumption_id") REFERENCES energy_consumption ("consumption_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_billing_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the electric vehicle */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of maintenance */,
  "maintenance_status" TEXT /* Status of the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_cost" REAL /* Cost associated with the maintenance */,
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the technician who performed the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES electric_vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agv" (
  "agvidf" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each AGV */,
  "startNode" INTEGER /* Starting node of the AGV */,
  "capability" TEXT /* Capability of the AGV */,
  "speed" REAL /* Speed of the AGV */,
  "charge" REAL /* Charge of the AGV */,
  "dischargeRate" REAL /* Discharge rate of the AGV */,
  "chargingRate" REAL /* Charging rate of the AGV */,
  "travelCost" REAL /* Travel cost of the AGV */,
  "lowerThreshold" REAL /* Lower threshold of the AGV */,
  "upperThreshold" REAL /* Upper threshold of the AGV */,
  "last_location" TEXT /* Last known location of the AGV */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status of the AGV */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance performed on the AGV */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Predicted date for the next maintenance */,
  "mileage" REAL /* Total distance traveled by the AGV */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agvidf")
)
